name: I recovered but re-injured same spot at home—can I reopen my claim?
description: Maybe. Must prove work injury never fully healed AND home injury aggravated original work injury. Medical evidence needed.

mainEntity.name: I recovered but re-injured same spot at home—can I reopen my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe. Must prove work injury never fully healed AND home injury aggravated original work injury. Medical evidence needed.
